meta.title: Discover Robots – Cognitive Robots in 3D
meta.description: Explore cognitive robots interactively in 3D – with real technical data on weight, sensors, payload and degrees of freedom. Independently assessed by EmAI.

hero.title: Experience cognitive robots in 3D
hero.subtitle: Rotate, zoom and understand: real hardware with real technical data. We bring these robots into real environments — and share what we learn.

robots.intro: Before a robot makes sense on your production or logistics floor, you should understand it. Here you'll find a growing selection of cognitive robots — interactive in 3D, with solid technical data and a neutral assessment. Not a sales brochure, but the basis for an informed decision.

head-lidar.label: Livox Mid-360 LiDAR
head-lidar.description: 360° laser scanner for navigation and environment perception.

depth-cam.label: RealSense D435i depth camera
depth-cam.description: Stereo depth imaging for 3D capture and object recognition.

dex-hand.label: Dex3-1 three-finger hand
dex-hand.description: Force-controlled hand with 7 degrees of freedom and 33 tactile sensors per hand.

viewer.a11y: Interactive 3D model. Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom.
viewer.placeholderNote: Preview model – detailed 3D model coming soon.

g1-edu.sensors: Livox Mid-360 LiDAR · RealSense D435i · IMU · 4-mic array

h1.sensors: Livox Mid-360 3D LiDAR · RealSense D435i · IMU

go2.sensors: 4D LiDAR L1 · HD wide-angle camera 120° · IMU

g1-edu.tagline: Humanoid robot for research and education – with the three-finger Dex3-1 hand for dexterous manipulation.
g1-edu.description: The G1 EDU is Unitree's compact humanoid robot for research, teaching and prototyping. With up to 43 degrees of freedom, force-controlled joints and the Dex3-1 three-finger hand, it suits manipulation tasks, imitation learning and dataset collection. EmAI deploys the G1 EDU in real environments and shares what it learns.

h1.tagline: Dynamic full-body humanoid – holder of the humanoid walking speed record.
h1.description: The H1 is a large, dynamic humanoid robot with high power density. With 3D LiDAR and a depth camera for 360° perception, it is built for locomotion, balance and robust whole-body motion.

go2.tagline: Agile quadruped with 4D LiDAR – ideal for inspection, research and mobile sensing.
go2.description: The Go2 is an agile quadruped with 4D LiDAR L1 for seamless environment perception. Compact, fast and capable, it suits inspection, mapping and mobile sensor payloads across industry and research.

b2.tagline: Industrial quadruped with high payload – for demanding field deployments.
b2.description: The B2 is Unitree's industrial quadruped with high payload and range. It handles steps and inclines, carries heavy loads and is built for long missions in harsh environments.

cta.title: Which robot fits your use case?
cta.body: We test cognitive robots in real environments and independently assess what works for you — with no vendor lock-in.
